headline: Boeing (BA) Unveils MQ 28 Ghost Bat At Farnborough Airshow 2026
summary: Boeing plans to debut its MQ-28 Ghost Bat autonomous combat aircraft at the Farnborough International Airshow 2026. The company is using the event to spotlight advanced defense programs and broader sustainability efforts. The MQ-28 public display highlights a push into autonomous and collaborative combat aircraft and expanded defense services. Boeing (NYSE:BA), trading at $215.51, is putting fresh attention on its defense and autonomous systems work with the upcoming public debut of the...

headline: Aviation Capital Group Signs Lease Agreements with WestJet for 13 New Boeing 737-10 Aircraft
summary: Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG), a premier global full-service aircraft asset manager, today announced that it has signed lease agreements with Canadian carrier, WestJet, for the long-term lease of thirteen Boeing 737-10 aircraft. The placement follows ACG's delivery of two Boeing 737-8 aircraft to the airline in February 2026.
